targets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_watch_events WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM video_watch_events WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
SELECT ROUND(SUM(watch_duration_seconds)/3600) FROM video_watch_events WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
SELECT toStartOfHour(event_time) as time, COUNT(*) as views FROM video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT video_id, COUNT(*) as views, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as unique_users, AVG(watch_duration_seconds) as avg_duration FROM video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY video_id ORDER BY views DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT device_type, COUNT(*) as views FROM video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY device_type
SELECT country_code as code, COUNT(*) as views FROM video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY country_code
SELECT toHour(event_time) as hour, COUNT(*) as views FROM video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
